text: search for the latest research on quantum error correction published in Nature
run this Python code to calculate the Fibonacci sequence up to 100: def fib(n): a,b=0,1; print(a,b,sep='\n'); [print(a:=b+(b:=a)) for _ in range(n-2)]
send an email to jane.doe@company.com with subject 'Q3 Budget Review' and body 'Please find the attached draft for review by Friday'
query the database for all customers who haven't made a purchase in the last 90 days and return their email addresses
open the file /home/user/report.pdf and extract the table on page 3
search for top-rated Italian restaurants in Chicago, filter by those with outdoor seating, then email me the top 3 results with their addresses and phone numbers
deploy to production the latest commit on the main branch, but only if all CI checks pass; if not, create a ticket in Jira with the failed test details
call the weather API for San Francisco and return the 5-day forecast
check the logs for any 500 errors in the last hour and summarize the endpoints affected
book a flight from New York to London for next Tuesday, departing after 6 PM, and schedule a reminder for 24 hours before departure
Search for the latest research on transformer attention mechanisms and then summarize the key findings in bullet points
Run this Python code to parse the CSV file, but if it fails because the file doesn't exist, create a new empty CSV with the correct headers
Open the file /var/log/nginx/error.log and check for the last 50 lines of errors from the past hour
Send an email to sarah@company.com with the subject 'Q3 Budget Review' and attach the quarterly report PDF from the shared drive
Schedule a meeting with the design team on Thursday at 2 PM, but first check my calendar for any conflicts and suggest an alternative time if there is one
Check the logs of the authentication service for any failed login attempts in the last 15 minutes and alert me if there are more than 5
Look up the weather in Tokyo for next Tuesday, then book a flight from New York to Tokyo arriving the day before, and a hotel for three nights in Shinjuku
Call the Stripe API to create a new customer record with the details from this form, and if the API returns a 409 conflict, update the existing record instead
Deploy version 2.3.1 to production, but do it as a phased rollout: start with 10% of traffic, and if error rates stay below 1% for 10 minutes, proceed to 100%; otherwise, roll back to version 2.3.0
Print this document on the office printer in room 204
